input.currentText: [fixture] I think we both agree on the BC and Sweden data showing carbon-tax effectiveness; the open question is whether that generalizes. What if both hold — they work where enforcement is stable, and the open question is which dominates by 2030? I think we are mostly aligned; the remaining piece is the timing question.
input.parentText: [fixture] A debate over whether carbon taxes reduce emissions generally.
